keys.description: uvicorn bind port
app log level
the runtime kernel's runtime.v1 surface the dispatcher spawns workers on (+ schedule.v1 for routines)
the opaque runtime.v1 profile the worker is spawned under (P11)
how the runtime's scheduler reaches THIS service's /invocations sink when a routine fires
where the dispatch's workspaces materialize inside the worker
workspace git ref the dispatch pins
the workspace store (object bucket) the runtime syncs granted workspaces from
host path / docker named volume the runtime binds into the worker as the workspace store backing

keys.default: (empty — FAIL-CLOSED: 401 when the gateway's X-User-Id is absent)
keys.description: single-user fallback subject for a direct/self-host deploy with no gateway in front
the per-dispatch unit:<id>:out/:in streams the control plane relays (SSE) + the transcript tail
the per-subject workspace tree this control plane reads (WorkspaceReader) and seeds
the registry of workspace templates (one validated seed per subdir)
explicit, already-resolved seed dir override (tests / special deploys)
which workspace template new subjects are seeded from
the claude model alias/name for chat + workspace turns
the streaming/meeting-copilot model label
llm-module CompletionPort adapter key forwarded into workers by dispatch
llm-module deployment-default model forwarded into workers by dispatch
operator gate on workspace-pinned models (comma-separated)
live-meeting copilot idle timeout (s)
tool.v1 descriptors + MCP launch specs a unit's tools resolve against
workspace-authored routines reconcile interval (0 disables the reconciler)
brokered, scoped identity the worker presents (ADR-0003)
the shared key per-dispatch tokens are signed with (dev tier; k8s → SPIRE behind the same seam)
the gateway base URL for 'add bot from URL' (POST /bots) and the transcript relay's numeric→native resolve
API key this control plane presents to the gateway (mint one via admin-api / `make all`)

DOCKER-HOST path to a claude credentials JSON. agent-api does not use it itself — the RUNTIME bind-mounts it into every spawned worker at /root/.claude/.credentials.json (see the runtime's config.v1) — but the agent plane's /health surfaces whether ANY model-credential path is configured, because that is where the operator looks when chat fails
API-key credential path (brokered into workers by the runtime; surfaced here for the agent plane's /health row)
OAuth/OpenRouter-style bearer credential path (brokered into workers by the runtime; surfaced here for the agent plane's /health row)

bot_gateway.description: this control plane can call the gateway as a client — 'add bot from URL' + the transcript relay's numeric→native meeting-id resolve
bot_gateway.when_unconfigured: POST /api/meeting/bot fails loud; /api/meeting/relay-health reports a typed native_resolve error (kind=unauthorized/not-configured) instead of silent dead air

model_inference.description: spawned agent-workers will have a model-provider credential path available (the runtime brokers/mounts it; see the runtime's config.v1 for the mount mechanics + file probe)
model_inference.when_unconfigured: terminal chat / workspace turns fail inside the worker ('Model inference failed: Not logged in') — set HOST_CLAUDE_CREDENTIALS (subscription mount) or an ANTHROPIC_* key

surface_only.reason: not read by the control plane — the runtime brokers it into workers; present on this service via env_file/helm for historical symmetry
not read by the control plane — the runtime brokers it into workers; present on this service historically
